testcase.name: verifyQRCodeDisplayed

error.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for visibility of Proxy element for: DefaultElementLocator 'By.xpath: //*[@alt='Profile QR']' (tried for 10 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval)
